policy_summary.simple_summary: This is an endowment plan with a 25-year term. It offers guaranteed death benefit and maturity benefit. Returns are moderate and suitable for conservative investors.

key_benefits: Death benefit equal to sum assured
hidden_clauses: Bonus is not guaranteed and depends on company performance
Surrender value may be less than total premiums paid in early years

risky_clauses.snippet: Bonus payment is subject to company performance and market conditions.

recommendation: Suitable for conservative investors seeking guaranteed returns with life cover. Not ideal for wealth creation - consider term insurance plus mutual funds for better long-term returns.
